assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command with Saturday 2:00-8:00 AM UTC window and FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence for weekend-only maintenance

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows explicit gcloud container clusters update with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides example Q1 code freeze exclusion with gcloud command using --add-maintenance-exclusion-* flags and mentions repeating for Q2, Q3, Q4

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command for annual-audit-2024 exclusion covering November 1-30, 2024 with no_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Includes table showing 'Max Duration: 30 days' for no_upgrades exclusions, though doesn't explicitly explain handling longer freezes

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: States in operational recommendations that 'exclusions don't block manual upgrades, only auto-upgrades' and suggests manually initiating upgrades during maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends migrating to Stable channel for SOX compliance, citing better predictability and testing, though doesn't mention Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows multiple gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about risks of falling behind on versions during long exclusions, though mentions version monitoring in operational recommendations
